title: Online Reporting - Effluent Regulatory Reporting Information System (ERRIS) - Canada.ca
content:
## Online reporting - Effluent Regulatory Reporting Information System
The Wastewater Systems Effluent Regulations (the Regulations) require owners and operators to submit information about their wastewater system and effluent releases. This includes the size and location of the wastewater treatment system. The volume and quality of the effluent released must also be reported. This page provides information on how to submit the required reports.
You can submit reports through the Effluent Regulatory Reporting System (ERRIS). ERRIS is available from the Single Window web site .
ERRIS lets owners and operators submit all the data required by the Regulations:
- Identification report
- Combined sewer overflow reports
ERRIS also lets you submit applications online for:
- Temporary bypass authorization
- Temporary authorization to deposit un-ionized ammonia
- Transitional authorization
Guidance has been developed to help you create and manage an account in the Single Window and submit data in ERRIS.
- Instructional videos
- Monitoring report user guide
- Temporary bypass authorization application user guide
- Transitional authorization - available upon request
- Temporary authorization to deposit un-ionized ammonia user guide - available upon request
- Combined sewer overflow reporting user guide - available upon request

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
